indicators.name: Floor
indicators.rationale: The floor appears to be made of tiles, which could be slippery and uncomfortable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: Ceiling
indicators.rationale: The high ceiling provides ample space for movement during yoga and stretching exercises.

indicators.name: Windows
indicators.rationale: The large windows allow natural light to enter, creating a pleasant atmosphere for yoga.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga and stretching due to the floor material but has positive aspects such as ample space and natural light.
